title: Context Menu
description: The Context Menu component displays a customizable menu when a user interacts with a designated target element (typically via right-click). It supports configurable opening and closing triggers, horizontal or vertical orientation, and custom menu items.

sections.title: Usage
sections.description: A simple example of using ax-context-menu.

sections.title: Basic
sections.description: Right-click target with nested and disabled items; emits onItemClick.

sections.title: Dynamic Items
sections.description: Use onOpening to mutate items based on the specific target element.

sections.title: Programmatic Open
sections.description: Open the menu programmatically at a point using showAt without a bound target.

props.name: items
props.description: Array of menu items to display.

props.name: target
props.description: Target element(s) for the context menu.

props.name: hasArrow
props.description: Whether to show an arrow pointing to the target element.

props.name: nativeElement
props.description: The root DOM element of the component. Inherited from NXComponent.

props.name: isRendered
props.description: Signal indicating if the component has been rendered. Inherited from NXComponent.

events.name: onItemClick
events.description: Emitted when a menu item is clicked.

methods.content:
/**
 * Refreshes the context menu by rebinding event listeners to target elements.
 */
 refresh(): void

/**
 * Shows the context menu at a specific point.
 * @param point - The coordinates where the menu should appear
 * @param targetElement - Optional target element for the context menu
 * @param event - Optional opening event with menu items
 */
 showAt(point: AXPoint, targetElement?: HTMLElement, event?: AXContextMenuOpeningEvent): void

/**
 * Closes the context menu and removes the backdrop.
 */
 close(): void
